system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.

{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_version_insert","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_VERSION_INSERT]
(
	@masp nvarchar(200),
	@dinhmuc nvarchar(10) = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
	IF @dinhmuc = 'GVA'
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_govan_version
		(
			[id],[pcode],[c_level],[masp],[mact],[stt],[chitiet],[nguyenlieu],[chatluong],[long],[loainguyenlieu],
			[dayy_tc],[rong_tc],[dai_tc],[soluong_tc],[m2_tc],[m3_tc],
			[dayy_sc],[rong_sc],[dai_sc],[soluong_sc],[m3_sc],
			[dayy_phoi],[cachlayphoi],[ghichu],[quytrinhgiacong],[hinhanh],[hoanthanh],
			[ngaytao],[nguoitao],[nguoisua],[ngaysua],
			[soluong_mong],[kichthuoc_mong],[mong1],[mong2],
			[veneer_matchinh],[veneer_matphu],[veneer_canhngan],[veneer_canhdai],[selection],
			[uv_mat1],[uv_mat2],[uv_canh1],[uv_canh2],[uv_dau1],[uv_dau2],[m2_uv],
			[thoigian],[uv_code],[uv_quytrinh],[bemat],[chitiet_ghep],[chitiet_ghep2],
			[phoi_ghep],[somat_giacong],[t_sort],[cum_trai],[cum_phai],[cum_truoc],[cum_sau],[cum_dinh],[cum_day],
			[IsChiTietRoi],[son_mat1],[son_mat2],[son_canh1],[son_canh2],[son_dau1],[son_dau2],[m2_son],
			[cc_mat1],[cc_mat2],[cc_canh1],[cc_canh2],[cc_dau1],[cc_dau2],
			[IsConverted],[IsGroup],[mact_v2],[danveneer],[veneer_canh],[loaiveneer],[veneer_1_mat],[veneer_2_mat],[veneer_dan_canh],
			[uv_matchinh],[uv_matphu],[uv_canhngan],[uv_canhdai],[id_nguyenlieu],
			[phoi_tructiep],[phoi_ghep_ngang],[phoi_ghep_finger],[ghepthanh],[gheptam],
			[idTieuChuanPhoi],[gioihan_boiso_tam],[phoi_giacong_ngoai],[banve],
			[fsc_100],[fsc_mix],[fsc_cw],[uv_matchinh1],[uv_matphu1],[uv_canhngan1],[uv_canhdai1],
			[fsc_recycled],[non_fsc],[backup_date]
		)
		SELECT [id],[pcode],[c_level],[masp],[mact],[stt],[chitiet],[nguyenlieu],[chatluong],[long],[loainguyenlieu],
			[dayy_tc],[rong_tc],[dai_tc],[soluong_tc],[m2_tc],[m3_tc],
			[dayy_sc],[rong_sc],[dai_sc],[soluong_sc],[m3_sc],
			[dayy_phoi],[cachlayphoi],[ghichu],[quytrinhgiacong],[hinhanh],[hoanthanh],
			[ngaytao],[nguoitao],[nguoisua],[ngaysua],
			[soluong_mong],[kichthuoc_mong],[mong1],[mong2],
			[veneer_matchinh],[veneer_matphu],[veneer_canhngan],[veneer_canhdai],[selection],
			[uv_mat1],[uv_mat2],[uv_canh1],[uv_canh2],[uv_dau1],[uv_dau2],[m2_uv],
			[thoigian],[uv_code],[uv_quytrinh],[bemat],[chitiet_ghep],[chitiet_ghep2],
			[phoi_ghep],[somat_giacong],[t_sort],[cum_trai],[cum_phai],[cum_truoc],[cum_sau],[cum_dinh],[cum_day],
			[IsChiTietRoi],[son_mat1],[son_mat2],[son_canh1],[son_canh2],[son_dau1],[son_dau2],[m2_son],
			[cc_mat1],[cc_mat2],[cc_canh1],[cc_canh2],[cc_dau1],[cc_dau2],
			[IsConverted],[IsGroup],[mact_v2],[danveneer],[veneer_canh],[loaiveneer],[veneer_1_mat],[veneer_2_mat],[veneer_dan_canh],
			[uv_matchinh],[uv_matphu],[uv_canhngan],[uv_canhdai],[id_nguyenlieu],
			[phoi_tructiep],[phoi_ghep_ngang],[phoi_ghep_finger],[ghepthanh],[gheptam],
			[idTieuChuanPhoi],[gioihan_boiso_tam],[phoi_giacong_ngoai],[banve],
			[fsc_100],[fsc_mix],[fsc_cw],[uv_matchinh1],[uv_matphu1],[uv_canhngan1],[uv_canhdai1],
			[fsc_recycled],[non_fsc],GETDATE()
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan WITH(NOLOCK)
		WHERE masp = @masp
	END
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_version"],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
